creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 223570
Please approve, I will commit it then together with the gitlab upgrade

With the upgrade of gitlab-ce to 13.10 chef needs also an update.
The full upgrade is visible here:
https://gitlab.fechner.net/mfechner/Gitlab/-/commits/13.10

I will attach you a diff for the two ports you are a maintainer.
